content: Phase 1: Extend vendor models + backfill defaults + PATCH /auth/me/onboarding endpoint
Phase 1: Update SignupRequest to accept new profile fields (city, primary_market_type, expected_markets_count)
Phase 1: Redesign Signup.js as 2-step form with new fields
Phase 1: Manual test — signup flow + /auth/me/onboarding endpoint
Phase 2: Build WelcomeModal component (once-per-session + welcome_dismissed logic)
Phase 2: Build OnboardingChecklist component on Dashboard (whole-card dismiss)
Phase 2: Wire WelcomeModal into Layout (shows after login for non-dismissed vendors)
Phase 3: Guided tour overlay (spotlight sidebar stops) with startTour/endTour
Phase 3: Optional /onboarding wizard route (all fields required inside wizard)
Phase 3: Settings additions — Replay tour + Re-run setup wizard buttons
